stdout:
== topology ==
[Error] g3rs-topology/no-nested-workspaces crates/nested_workspace/Cargo.toml Nested workspace `crates/nested_workspace` is forbidden
  `crates/nested_workspace/Cargo.toml` declares a nested workspace under `.`. Cargo does not support nested workspaces. Remove the `[workspace]` section from this Cargo.toml, or move it so it is not nested under `.`.
[Error] g3rs-topology/no-nested-guardrail3-rs-toml crates/nested_guardrail/guardrail3-rs.toml Nested adopted Rust unit `crates/nested_guardrail` is forbidden
  `crates/nested_guardrail/guardrail3-rs.toml` declares a nested adopted Rust unit under `.`. Nested guardrail3 adoption breaks ownership routing. Remove `crates/nested_guardrail/guardrail3-rs.toml`, or move the inner unit so it is not nested under `.`.
[Error] g3rs-topology/declared-workspace-members-only crates/unlisted/Cargo.toml Workspace child `crates/unlisted` must be declared explicitly
  `crates/unlisted/Cargo.toml` sits under workspace `.`, but it is not a declared workspace member. Workspace membership must exactly match real child Rust roots. Add this crate's path to `[workspace] members` in `./Cargo.toml`.
[Error] g3rs-topology/workspace-local-file-placement crates/nested_guardrail/guardrail3-rs.toml `cargo` file `crates/nested_guardrail/guardrail3-rs.toml` is illegally placed
  `crates/nested_guardrail/guardrail3-rs.toml` is nested under `crates/nested_guardrail`. Workspace-local `cargo` files must live directly at the workspace root `.` rather than in nested subdirectories.
[Error] g3rs-topology/workspace-local-file-placement crates/nested_guardrail/guardrail3-rs.toml `deps` file `crates/nested_guardrail/guardrail3-rs.toml` is illegally placed
  `crates/nested_guardrail/guardrail3-rs.toml` is nested under `crates/nested_guardrail`. Workspace-local `deps` files must live directly at the workspace root `.` rather than in nested subdirectories.
[Error] g3rs-topology/workspace-local-file-placement crates/nested_guardrail/guardrail3-rs.toml `garde` file `crates/nested_guardrail/guardrail3-rs.toml` is illegally placed
  `crates/nested_guardrail/guardrail3-rs.toml` is nested under `crates/nested_guardrail`. Workspace-local `garde` files must live directly at the workspace root `.` rather than in nested subdirectories.
